name: report-subscriptions
description: CSA Loom report-subscriptions timer Function (WS-C2). On REPORT_SUBSCRIPTIONS_CRON it reads enabled report subscriptions from Cosmos, selects the ones whose own NCRONTAB cron is due, renders each report Azure-native (paginated-report-renderer — no Power BI ExportTo / Fabric dependency), POSTs the rendered bytes to the delivery Logic App (Office 365 email), and writes an append-only ReportDeliveryLog row the [subId]/logs route surfaces. Managed-identity auth, no keys.
